title: VRBO Reviews API Scraper
description: Extract VRBO property reviews from Expedia GraphQL APIs. Provide either a VRBO/Expedia URL or direct propertyId.

url.title: Property URL
url.description: VRBO or Expedia property URL. If present, actor tries to extract expediaPropertyId or related property id from it.

propertyId.title: Property ID
propertyId.description: Expedia property id (recommended). This value takes priority over url parsing.

results_wanted.title: Maximum number of reviews
results_wanted.description: Maximum number of reviews to save.

max_pages.title: Maximum pages
max_pages.description: Safety cap for paginated review requests.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Use Apify Proxy. Residential proxies are recommended for stable results.
